entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A molecular breeding strategy used to predict the breeding value of individuals based on genome-wide markers for crop improvement.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of plants to improve yield, quality, or resilience.

entities.name: GERMPLASM USE
entities.description: The utilization of genetic resources to introduce desired traits into breeding populations.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of measuring and analyzing the physical and observable traits of plants.

entities.name: MARKER GENOTYPING METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to identify and analyze genetic markers across the genome.

entities.name: STATISTICAL MODELS
entities.description: Mathematical frameworks used to analyze genomic data and predict trait values in genomic selection.

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants targeted for genetic improvement through molecular breeding strategies.
